gap_report.recommendation: Create comprehensive content on enterprise security features and obtain security-focused backlinks to compete with Kong's authority in secure MCP gateway searches.
Develop comparison guides and case studies highlighting Arcade's enterprise advantages, focusing on high-intent 'best' keyword variations.
Build dedicated on-premise deployment documentation and landing pages to capture searches for self-hosted MCP solutions.
Create integration galleries and technical documentation showcasing pre-built MCP server connections to compete with Merge's integration content.
Develop OAuth 2.1 implementation guides and security whitepapers to establish authority in authentication-related MCP searches.
Publish technical content on per-user authentication patterns for AI agents, including implementation examples and best practices.
Create enterprise-focused content hubs covering MCP management at scale, targeting IT decision-makers and architects.
Build integration-specific landing pages for popular platforms (Gmail, Slack, Salesforce) with clear MCP connection guides.
Develop comparison content explaining when to use MCP versus direct API integration, targeting technical evaluators.
Create thought leadership content on agent authorization platforms to establish domain authority in this emerging category.
Publish Vercel AI SDK integration tutorials and sample code to capture developer-focused search traffic.
Develop VPC deployment guides and enterprise architecture diagrams to compete for infrastructure-related searches.
Create RBAC implementation guides specifically for MCP tools, targeting security-conscious enterprise buyers.
Publish testing methodologies and benchmarks for MCP tool selection accuracy to establish technical credibility.
Optimize homepage and category pages for the broad 'Enterprise MCP' term through on-page SEO and internal linking.
Create Google ADK integration documentation and code samples to capture developer search traffic.
Develop air-gapped deployment guides for high-security environments to compete with Teleport's infrastructure focus.
Build self-hosted deployment documentation and comparison pages highlighting Arcade's on-premise capabilities.
Create technical content on token lifecycle management best practices for AI agent implementations.
Publish advanced tutorials on agent chaining and sequential tool calling patterns to capture technical searches.
Develop architectural content on MCP server aggregation patterns and gateway design to establish technical authority.
Create evaluation framework content and benchmarking tools to compete for MCP evaluation-related searches.
Build enterprise SSO/SAML integration guides specifically for MCP implementations to capture enterprise security searches.
Develop compliance and governance frameworks for agent actions to compete in regulated industry searches.
